title: Configure Oban queues in config/runtime.exs
prompt: Write a `config/runtime.exs` snippet that configures Oban with the `MyApp.Repo`, three queues — `default: 10`, `mailers: 20`, `reports: 5` — and no plugins. The snippet should be self-contained (start with `import Config`) and target `:my_app, Oban`. Write to `config/runtime.exs`.
tier_rationale: Canonical Oban config shape; no edge cases involved.
